title: Relation Base (composes _meta.schema.json#/$defs/baseFields)
description: Relation composition base. Every type-specific relation schema (relation.part-of.schema.json etc.) MUST compose this via allOf + $ref AND set unevaluatedProperties: false ON THE LEAF (NOT here). Per JSON Schema 2020-12 spec, unevaluatedProperties evaluates against annotations in its own scope only; placing it on this base schema would reject leaf-defined properties when the base is referenced as an allOf branch (fixed in Phase 3 plan 03-01 Wave 1 — see SUMMARY.md deviations). NEVER use additionalProperties: false (Pitfall #1 — it does not see allOf-composed siblings, so it would silently reject the very baseFields it is supposed to inherit) anywhere. Adds the relation-only fields (type, schema_version, subject, object, valid_from, valid_until) on top of universal baseFields (id, provenance, confidence, source). Schema version: 0.1.0.

type.description: Discriminator. Each leaf type schema overrides with const. Examples: 'part_of', 'interfaces_with', 'complies_with', 'requires', 'constrained_by'.

subject.description: Subject entity URI per D-23 form aviationkb://<type>/<slug>@<version>. The 'from' peer in directional relations; either peer in symmetric ones — order is symbolic. Phase 3 validator confirms the entity exists.

object.description: Object entity URI per D-23 form aviationkb://<type>/<slug>@<version>. The 'to' peer in directional relations.

valid_from.description: When this relationship became valid. Required.

valid_until.description: When this relationship ceased to be valid. null = currently valid (no expiration). Optional field; absence is treated identically to null.
